---
title: "Lab 00: R Setup"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Goal

Check that R, RStudio, and packages are working.

```r
R.version.string
getwd()
```

## Install basic packages

```r
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "Matrix", "patchwork", "here", "renv"))
```

## Test loading

```r
library(tidyverse)
library(Matrix)
library(here)
```
